raw_text: Hello team, we have a new batch ready for shipping. 500 units of ESP32 WROOM32 microcontroller dev boards. The price is 145 INR per piece. Ships from Guangdong warehouse.
Namaste. As discussed, we can supply the Banarasi silk sarees with heavy zari border work. Minimum order is 120 pieces. We are quoting 4500 INR per saree. Handwoven in UP.
Invoice attached for the vintage camera lot. Includes 45 refurbished 1990s point-and-shoot 35mm film cameras. Total lot price is 180000 INR. Sourced from Kyoto, Japan.
Container ready. 2000 kg of premium Arabica coffee beans. Current market rate is 650 INR/kg. Port of origin is Santos.
Confirmation for the tournament gear: 300 sets of wooden Staunton design chess pieces (weighted). Price per set is 1200 INR. Dispatching from Amritsar.
Quote for construction materials: 150 tons of galvanized steel pipes, 4-inch diameter. Pricing stands at 75000 INR per ton. Origin: Busan, South Korea.
We can ship 500 kg of organic black pepper. Price is 850 INR per kilo. Fresh harvest from Kerala.
